name: plain-css-js-dependency
description: A fixture dependency mimicking @bynder/compact-view: a package that is not built with vanilla-extract but ships a plain JS module named `Styles.css.js`, which matches vanilla-extract's `cssFileFilter`. Installed through the `file:` protocol so pnpm copies it into node_modules (a real dependency path, not a workspace symlink). Deliberately no `"type": "module"` despite the ESM syntax, matching the real package's publish.
